tools.name: get_spot_prices
tools.description: Returns current spot prices for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium with daily change percentages

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Historical spot price data for a precious metal over a time range

tools.name: get_stack_signal
tools.description: Returns Stack Signal — TroyStack's curated precious metals market intelligence with Troy's commentary

tools.name: get_vault_watch
tools.description: Returns COMEX warehouse inventory: registered, eligible, combined ounces, daily changes, open interest, oversubscribed ratio

tools.name: get_junk_silver
tools.description: Calculates silver melt value for pre-1965 US coinage

tools.name: get_speculation
tools.description: Calculates price multipliers comparing current spot to hypothetical target prices

tools.name: chat_with_troy
tools.description: Ask Troy anything about precious metals, markets, your stack. Provide api_key for personalized portfolio-aware answers, or omit for general market analysis.

tools.name: get_portfolio
tools.description: Returns your precious metals portfolio: total value, cost basis, gain/loss, per-metal breakdown, and individual holdings

tools.name: add_holding
tools.description: Add a precious metals purchase to your portfolio

tools.name: get_analytics
tools.description: Cost basis, average cost per oz, break-even price, unrealized P/L per metal

tools.name: scan_receipt
tools.description: Extract precious metals purchase data from a receipt image using AI vision

tools.name: get_daily_brief
tools.description: Troy's daily market brief. Provide api_key for personalized brief, or omit for the latest Stack Signal market synthesis.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "chat_with_troy" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Ask Troy anything about precious metals, markets, your stack. Provide api_key for personalized portfolio-aware answers, or omit for general market analysis.
